resources.string: Browse listings, save favorites, chat with sellers, and open Notifications so you never miss an update. You can close this anytime — it will not show again after you tap Get started.
Promo image %1$d of %2$d — swipe for more
Verify your identity to schedule meetups and trade more safely. It only takes a few minutes in our secure browser flow.
Boost visibility, get Explore priority, and unlock shop tools — built for sellers who list often on Fash.
A 5-star rating on the Play Store helps the pre-loved community grow and keeps Fash free for everyone.
Fash is a pre-loved fashion marketplace: browse listings, save favorites, chat with sellers, and stay on top of orders. The next steps highlight the main areas of the app.
Your personalized feed—discover listings, promos, and shortcuts to the parts of the app you will use most.
Track purchases and sales, payment status, shipping, and confirmations—right from the bottom navigation bar.
The + button in the middle of the bottom bar starts a new listing. You can refine photos, pricing, and shipping details before publishing.
Chat with buyers or sellers about sizing, offers, and order updates—all in one inbox-style tab.
See your listings, saved items, follows, and account tools. Open the ⋮ menu on Profile for settings and sign-out.
Search anywhere in the app, open Notifications for messages and activity, and use the bag icon to jump to your orders.
Sell what you no longer wear—so someone else can love it again.
Buy and sell pre-loved fashion, express your style
Please enter a valid email address.
We sent another code. Check your inbox.
Could not send OTP. Check network or server.
Too many requests. Please try again later.
Too many requests. Please try again in %1$d seconds.
Too many OTP requests. Please wait before requesting another code.
Too many OTP requests. Try again in %1$d seconds.
Add FACEBOOK_APP_ID and Facebook Client Token to your env/build.
Cannot reach Google\'s servers (network or DNS). Check your connection, turn off VPN or Private DNS, or try another Wi‑Fi or mobile data.
Google Play Services is not available. Update or install Google Play Services and try again.
Google Play Services is not available: %1$s
Google Sign-In is misconfigured: verify GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID (Web OAuth client) and an Android OAuth client (correct package name and debug/release SHA‑1) in Google Cloud Console.
Add GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID (OAuth Web client) to env, plus an Android OAuth client with your package name and SHA-1 in Google Cloud.
We sent a code to %1$s. It has %2$d digits.
Invalid or expired code. Try again.
Check your spam or promotions folder.
The code can take a minute to arrive.
Still nothing? Resend after the timer ends.
Vietnamese or English — applies across the app.
Enable or disable in Android settings
Manage product recommendations and do-not-disturb hours.
You won\'t receive recommendation push during this window.
Could not save preferences. Please try again.
API language prefix follows app language when the server uses locale-prefixed paths.
Account %1$s has %2$d new notifications. Sign out of the current account and sign in to view them.
Choose a password between 8 and 72 characters to protect your account. You’ll use it when signing in with email and password.
Could not update password. Try again.
Enter your current password and a new password (8–72 characters).
Optional — pick up to 3 styles or skip
Choose a unique username so everyone can find you.
Username can only contain letters, numbers and underscores.
Username can only contain letters, numbers and underscores.
Username is already taken. Choose another.
Pick your usual size to unlock the home feed. Body measurements are optional — no measuring tape needed.
Ranges follow the size you picked. Only fill these in if you know them — not required.
Optional — you can leave this blank
Common measurements for this size. Most people skip measuring — tap \"Use typical measurements\" or leave blank.
Could not save sizing. Try again.
What do you want to do on Fash?
We use this to personalize listings and sellers. You can pick both.
Could not save preferences. Try again.
Their new listings can show up on Home — so you won’t miss a drop.
Categories, brands, and aesthetics from active listings
Shop hints aren’t available due to blocking settings.
Could not load feed. Try again.
Loading profile, please wait a moment…
Follow sellers or explore to discover new items.
Listings pending approval or rejected by Fash. Tap one to view, edit, and resubmit if needed.
When you post an item, it appears here until approved. Rejected listings also show here so you can fix and resubmit.
Check your connection and try again.
Discover pre-loved fashion and accessories from sellers you follow
New listings from sellers you follow
Trending on Fash — scroll before it\'s gone
Follow a few shops to see their new listings here.
New listings from shops you follow
Follow sellers to see their new listings on Home — or open Explore to browse the full marketplace.
Follow shops to see their latest listings here.
Check back soon — new listings are added all the time.
Browse and save a few items so Fash can learn your taste.
Set your style in profile or save listings you like.
Save a few favorites — Fash will suggest items in the same vibe.
Short reads on outfits, pre-loved finds, and safer buying — tap a card to jump to related picks in Explore.
Tips for buying and styling pre-loved fashion — tap to read.
Your feedback helps us improve Fash every day.
What to scan in a listing, how to sanity-check sizing, and what to ask the seller before you buy.
Street layers that still feel light
Base tee plus a light jacket — easy city outfits for warm days and cooler nights.
Neutrals plus one accent — bag, belt, or earrings — is enough to stand out.
Soft fabrics and flats that work for brunch, errands, and a stroll around town.
Outsole wear, toe box shape, and a quick freshness check before you commit.
Pick a category to jump into Explore with that filter.
Stores getting attention right now — open a profile to see their latest listings.
Pick up where you left off with items you opened recently.
Browse shops and preview their latest listings. Tap a row to open a shop, or a photo for the listing. Use the search icon above to find a seller.
No sellers match. Try a different keyword.
This shop doesn’t have active listings — you can still open their profile to check back later.
Preview slot — no listing in this tile
Showing %1$d of %2$d listings — open shop to see the rest.
Full marketplace — hot and newly listed first
Their new drops appear on Home — so you never miss a fit.
Pick a style tag — Minimal, Vintage, Y2K — match your vibe.
Escrow checkout and support when an order doesn’t match the listing (per policy).
Try another filter or check back soon.
When something needs your attention — orders, messages, or shop activity — it will show up here.
Chat messages from buyers and sellers
Pull to refresh or try again. The service may be temporarily unavailable.
The inbox isn\'t configured on the server or you can\'t access it right now. Try again later.
New listing for people you follow
Remaining fields are only available as raw data below.
Personalized products and content for you
Reminders to come back and finish what you started
No notifications in this group yet
Couldn\'t mark all as read. Try again.
You have a new notification in your inbox.
Ranked by popularity. Tap a profile to open their shop, or a photo to view a listing.
Show only listings that fit the size in your profile
No size saved yet — Fash will estimate from height & weight if provided
Showing listings nationwide — turn on to see shops near your area
Add a default address or pick a province / district to filter
Add a default address to see nearby shops, or pick a province / district manually.
Save a reference size or your height & weight so Fash can match you to listings that actually fit. You can skip and come back later.
Add your size & measurements so Fash surfaces only what fits you.
Pick your usual size to unlock the home feed. Measurements improve suggestions but are optional.
Enter these first so Fash can suggest sizes more accurately (optional).
Tap each measurement field below to see the reference range for your selected size.
At %1$d cm and %2$s kg, your best fit is size %3$s.
At %1$d cm tall, we suggest size %2$s.
You could also try %1$s if you prefer a looser fit.
Add a photo so buyers and sellers can recognize you.
Tap the camera icon to choose a photo from your library.
Please add a photo or tap Skip.
Helps us suggest better sizing when measurements are blank.
Who do you usually shop for?
Open filters — category, style, price, and sort
Tap to open — adjust filters in one place
Pick a group below — start with For you, then refine product and price.
Match your size — a tighter feed
Shops near you — province, district, ward
Set a price range that fits
Match my size — show listings that fit your profile measurements.
Area — filter by province, district, or ward where shops ship from.
Category — narrow down the type of items you want.
Style — pick one or more aesthetic tags.
Price & sort — set a price range and condition when needed.
Sizing and area — optional, helps the feed feel closer to you.
Category, style, brand, country of origin.
Price range, condition, and display order.
Pick province/city → district → ward (more detail = narrower filter).
Search with a keyword to enable sort.
Type a keyword or pick a suggestion below.
See hot and new listings — no keyword needed
A fast preview — open full details when you\'re ready
Chat before you buy — meetup or ship safely on Fash
Full description, size, photos & buying terms
Scroll down for more product details
Product image %1$d of %2$d — swipe for more
Could not load product. Try again.

The estimated shipping fee is indicative and may change based on your delivery address and carrier rates. The seller ships from the region shown. The exact shipping cost is confirmed before you pay at checkout. Message the seller if you need a custom arrangement.
Explore-style two-column picks — each card label shows why it is related.
Check out this listing on Fash

%1$s on Fash — explore their second-hand closet.

Open in browser:
%2$s

Open in app:
%3$s
Send your shop link via chat apps and social networks
Photos of you wearing items sell 3x faster!
Items modeled or worn sell up to 3x faster than flat-lay or hanger shots.
Are you sure you want to leave? Your progress will not be saved.
Your listing was submitted successfully. It is now pending review. You will be notified when it is approved and visible on the marketplace.
e.g. Zara Blazer jacket size M
By tapping Post for sale, you agree to our\u00A0
Choose how you want to fill in listing details. You can still edit everything before posting.
Pre-fill style tags, size and measurements from your profile. Brand, photos, price, etc. stay manual.
Your profile has no style/size yet — continue and fill the remaining steps manually.
Keep the current flow — enter each step yourself.
No style/size on your profile yet — fill the remaining steps manually.
Pre-filled from your profile — you can change this anytime.
This is how others will see your listing on the feed and product detail page.
Review before posting. Tap any row to go back and edit.
Pick a parent category below—subcategories appear underneath. Tap a specific type to select it. Use search to jump straight to a leaf.
Required: choose one leaf category. Search finds matches along the full path (group names + final type).
Optional — up to 5 tags. These are vibes or looks, not your product category. Use search to filter the list.
Optional: pick up to 5 style tags. They help discovery and are separate from category.
No tags match your search. Try other words or clear the field.
First choose a category for your item, then optionally add style tags. You can scroll — each part is separate below.
Required. Search or browse, then tap one chip to select the type of item you are listing.
Optional — up to 5. These describe vibe or look (for example streetwear). They are not the same as your category above.
Pick a condition, then write a clear title and description so buyers know what they are getting.
No photo steps loaded for this category. Pick a leaf category in the previous step or try again.
Enter the price in Vietnamese Dong (VND). Type digits only — no dots or commas.
Pick a category to continue. Style tags stay optional.
Optional. Pick or search a brand.
Required: condition, title 3–60 characters. Description up to 500.
Optional. Where the item was made.
Optional. Enter numbers in the selected unit.
Adding size and measurements helps buyers compare with their own fit and makes your listing easier to sell. All fields are optional.
Optional. Size and measurements help buyers compare; enter numbers in the selected unit.
Everything here is optional. Size and measurements help buyers compare with their own fit and sell faster.\nPick cm or inch, then enter numbers in that unit.
Pick the tag size on the item. Measurements help buyers compare — optional; use the same reference chart as your profile sizing step.
Pick first to show the right size chart (men/women).
Price VND 1,000–100,000,000. Auto price drop: floor price & weekly percent (1–50%).
Optional. Pick a saved address; ID is sent when your address book is synced with the server.
No categories match. Try different words or clear search to browse the tree.
No saved address yet. Add one from Profile or the address screen.
Title must be at least 3 characters.
Title must be at most 60 characters.
Description must be at most 500 characters.
Price must be between 1,000 and 100,000,000 VND.
Floor price must be below the listing price.
Drop percent must be between 1 and 50.
You must agree to the on-site inspection commitment.
Too many style tags (max 5). Remove one to continue.
Title must be at least 3 characters.
Title must be at most 60 characters.
Add at least one photo to continue.
Price must be between 1,000 and 100,000,000 VND.
Floor price must be below the listing price.
Agree to the on-site inspection commitment to continue.
Complete the required fields to continue.
Could not load listing. Try again.
Could not save. Check your input and try again.
Could not delete. There may be orders or buyer conversations.
This listing cannot be edited in its current state.
Price must be between 1,000 and 100,000,000 VND.
This listing is hidden or moderated — it can’t be edited in the app.
This listing can’t be edited in its current state (sold, reserved, deleted, …) — view only.
Unselect all and save to clear style tags.
Style tags will be cleared when you save.
This listing was rejected. Update it based on Fash feedback, then save to resubmit for review.
After you save, the listing moves back to pending review. You can update title, price, description, brand, size, condition, style tags, country of origin, measurements, offers, and auto price drop.
The listing will be hidden from feeds. You cannot delete if there are any orders or buyer chat threads.

You can update title, price, description, brand, size, condition, style tags, country of origin, measurements, offers, and auto price drop. Photos, category, and shipping address cannot be changed here.
Address chosen when you posted — not editable on this screen.
Photos cannot be replaced after posting.
Same rules as when posting (floor price, percent per drop).
People you follow will show up here — discover sellers on Explore.
Open Explore or a listing and tap Follow when you like someone’s style.
You can manage who you follow anytime from this list.
When someone follows your account, they’ll appear in this tab.
List items and complete your profile to grow your audience.
Share your shop or listings so more buyers can find you.
Successful orders confirmed in the app
Average score appears after completed orders
Follow to see new listings on Home
Helps suggest better size matches when you browse and buy
Add your usual size and optional body measurements for better size filters.
Only approved, live listings appear here. Tap Post in the bottom bar to list a new item.
New listings appear here until Fash approves them.
Rejected listings show here — tap one to edit and resubmit.
Sold listings will appear here when you complete a sale.
Save items from Explore or Home to find them here.
Add new listings anytime from Post in the bottom bar.
Pending listings are usually reviewed soon.
Fix the listing based on feedback, then save to resubmit.
Explore more—save items from the Explore tab to fill this list.
Check your connection and try again. The app needs your setup status before opening the home experience.
Tap the camera icons to change cover or avatar
Pick tags that fit you — search below.
No styles yet — tap Edit styles to add.
Helps buyers filter by color and improves recommendations.
Start a conversation from your favorite item
Open a listing and tap Message to chat with the seller.
New chats will show up here — use Unread / Seller / Buyer filters to find them faster.
Browse new listings across the marketplace.
You\'re all caught up · Explore below
Do you agree to sell at this price?
The gateway temporarily returned an error (code %1$d). Try again. Text that looks like shell or SQL commands is sometimes blocked by edge security — rephrase or contact support.
Price proposal accepted — an escrow order was created in the app.
Price agreed in chat. Schedule a meetup or record the deal — no escrow order is created from this step.
Clear offers help both sides agree quickly.
This message will be deleted. You can only delete within 5 minutes.
Send a message to start the conversation.
Say hi and ask for more photos or details if you need them.
Agree on price, shipping fee, and address before you place an order.
Escrow order created — finish in the app to hold your spot
Waiting for the buyer to finish in the app
Updating order status — tap to view
Important: Complete checkout soon in the app to keep this escrow hold. Expired holds may be cancelled under policy.
The buyer should complete checkout in the app soon — expired holds may be cancelled.
Agreed amount: %1$s. Next: schedule an in-person meetup (place & time). Offline deals do not use app escrow unless you create a separate order.
After you agree on a price, pick an in-person meetup or ship with online payment in the app.
Pay cash in person when you meet. You can set the time in chat afterward.
Buyer adds a shipping address and pays online; seller ships against the order.
Shipping with in-app payment is coming soon. You can choose in-person meetup above.
After you agree on a price, you can choose in-person meetup for now. Shipping with online payment will open in an upcoming update.
This option is coming soon. Please choose in-person meetup or check back later.
Cancel before payment — the listing may become available again.
Price agreed at %1$s — continue with shipping or payment.
Buy now at %1$s — add address and pay.

Message the seller to offer a lower price (within the per-conversation limit). Buy now keeps the listed price and goes straight to shipping and payment. Both sides are protected through in-app orders.
Message the seller to offer a lower price (within the per-conversation limit). After you agree, you can choose in-person meetup in chat. Shipping and in-app payment are coming soon.
Add a delivery address so the seller and carrier can fulfil correctly. Pick a saved address or create a new one.
No complete shipping address on this order yet — add or pick a saved address.
The buyer will add an address and pay online. You will see order status under Orders.
After payment is confirmed, open the order detail to add tracking when you ship.
Sign in as the buyer or seller on this order to see the right steps.
Online checkout for this path is disabled by configuration (C2C_SHIP_ONLINE_PAYMENT_ENABLED=false).
This order is awaiting payment. Complete checkout securely via the app payment flow.
Payments run through the app’s existing checkout flow.
Payment is already in progress or completed — open order details to track shipping.
Once the buyer pays, the order moves to states where you can ship. Use Orders to add tracking.
Sign in with the account tied to this order to see payment steps.
Pick a meetup spot and time — no need to share your home address.
Choose a safe public spot (café, mall) — your home address stays private.
Paste a Google Maps link if you prefer to pick the place yourself.
Pick a public place — never share your home address
Paste a Google Maps link (maps.app.goo.gl or google.com/maps). Both sides will see the place after the meetup is confirmed.
No safe spots for this area — try another city or use Enter Maps link.
Could not load safe meetup spots. Check your connection or use Enter Maps link.
Tap «On my way» before confirming you’ve arrived.
Other party is on their way 🚗
Could not complete that. Try again.
Use a valid Google Maps link (e.g. maps.app.goo.gl, google.com/maps).
This server has no meetup check-in API; chat and order were refreshed.
You already checked in — the meetup status (e.g. confirmed) is unchanged.
Check-in is only allowed within ±30 minutes of the scheduled time (MEETING_CHECK_IN_WINDOW).
Check-in only records that you arrived — it does not complete the order.
“I’ve arrived” works only within ±30 minutes of the scheduled meetup time.
Next: wait for the seller to confirm handoff (after the scheduled time), then confirm receipt on the order to finish.
Next: after the scheduled time, use Confirm handoff on the order; the buyer confirms receipt to complete the sale.
Proposed — waiting for the other person to confirm or suggest another time.
Time is locked — open the map and check in when you arrive; status stays confirmed after check-in.
No map link on this message — agree on the place in chat.
You can reopen the listing from your seller tools if you want.
Because of recent meetup no-shows, complete identity verification (KYC) as directed by Fash. When finished, tap “I’m done” to unlock scheduling meetups again.
Updated. You can propose meetups again.
Could not clear the flag yet. Finish verification or try again.
Verify your identity again to schedule meetups
Complete KYC using the link below, then tap “I’m done”.
Cash meetup — schedule and complete in person
A meetup is still scheduled — you can’t propose a new price until that time has passed or the meetup is cancelled.
New offers are paused while an upcoming meetup is scheduled.
Status: awaiting payment — finish checkout in the app to keep this order.
Status: awaiting payment — the buyer still needs to complete checkout.
Status: payment held in escrow — seller is preparing shipment or meetup.
Status: payment held — prepare handoff or confirm the meetup steps.
Status: on the way — track and confirm when you receive the item.
Status: on the way — make sure the buyer receives the item.
Status: delivered and confirmed — you’re all set on this order.
Status: delivered and confirmed — this sale completed successfully.
Status: cancelled — you can chat again or make a new offer if the listing is open.
Status: cancelled — review order details and your listing state.
Status: disputed — open the order for updates and support.
Status: disputed — respond from the order screen.
Status: cash / in-person — align on meetup details and complete safely on site.
Status: cash / in-person — follow handoff / meetup steps in the order flow.
Order status: %1$s — tap View order for the latest.
Order status: %1$s — tap View order for the latest.
Offer must be below listed price (%s)
Counter must be above the buyer\'s offer (%s)
Uses the confirmed meetup time and map link. You can add an agreed price below.
Could not complete that. Try again.
No confirmed meetup yet. Confirm the meetup first.
Please wait for the seller to respond to your current offer
You can’t send an offer right now (a deal may already exist or the listing isn’t available).
An order is already linked to this chat — pay or cancel it before sending a new offer.
This conversation is closed (e.g. another buyer reserved the listing).
This product thread allows up to %1$d price offers.
Used %1$d/%2$d offers (max %2$d per thread for this product).
You have 1 offer left (max %1$d per thread).
Reached %1$d/%2$d offers — cannot send more. If the seller updates the listing price, you can try again.
This item is available again — you can keep chatting.
Funds are held until you confirm delivery.
Dispute support if the item doesn’t match the description.
No payment methods are available. Please try again later.
Could not load payment methods. Check your connection and try again.
This order is already paid. Check Orders for shipping updates.
This order is no longer awaiting payment. Open Orders for the latest status.
Choose online escrow in chat before paying in the app.
This order was cancelled or expired. Place a new order to buy again.
Waiting for payment gateway… The app will update when payment completes.
Funds are held securely until you confirm receipt
From your saved address or order — no need to type again.
Add a shipping address in Profile (Shipping addresses) to pay.
Please don’t close the app. You’ll be sent to the payment gateway.
Could not start payment. Check core API (orders/…/payments/initiate) or try again.
No payment confirmation yet. Check Orders or try again.
Payment time ran out. Your order may have been cancelled — check Orders for details.
Orders appear when you buy an item
Orders appear when someone buys from you
Try another filter or pull down to refresh.
Explore listings and seller picks tailored for you.
Combine eligible orders to reduce delivery fees on your next checkout.
Track orders and message sellers in the app.
Complete orders on time to unlock more visibility. New campaigns may appear here.
Check your connection and try again.
The order will be cancelled and the listing may become available again. Continue?
Order cancelled. You can chat to negotiate again if the listing is still available.
Could not cancel the order. Try again.
This order cannot be cancelled in its current state.
Could not cancel the order. Try again later.
This helps us improve. Your reason is stored for product analytics.
Please describe your reason when choosing Other.
Was cancelling clear and fair? Your feedback is recorded to improve the product.
If the listing is still active, open chat to negotiate — up to %1$d price offers per conversation. If the seller updates the listing price, you may be able to offer again.
This item has been sold; you can’t continue with this order.
Both parties checked in. If you need urgent safety help, use SOS or contact local emergency services.
After you receive the item, confirm in the app.
Both parties checked in at the meetup — safety / SOS options may be available on the order screen if needed.
Both parties checked in. Open the order: after the seller confirms handoff, confirm you received the item to complete escrow.
Both parties checked in. Tap Confirm handoff below or on the order screen to complete the meetup handoff.
The seller confirmed handoff. Open the order and confirm receipt once you’ve inspected the item.
Waiting for the buyer to confirm receipt on the order to complete the deal.
Finish the next steps in the app so the seller can prepare your item.
You’ll be notified when there’s an update.
Pack and ship on time to avoid cancellation.
The seller will ship according to the order details.
Your order is on the way.
Please watch for updates or contact support.
Fash helps with refunds if the item doesn’t match the description or you don’t receive it (per policy).
Could not confirm handoff. Try again or check meetup time.
Updating check-in status from the server…
This server does not expose meetup check-in; the order was refreshed. Only confirm / cancel meeting APIs are available.
You already checked in (server did not write again).
Check-in does not change order status; completion still requires handoff and buyer receipt confirmation.
Price agreed. The buyer picks meet in person or ship & pay online in chat before continuing.
%1$s left to choose meetup or shipping — the order may auto-cancel if overdue
%1$s left for the buyer to choose — the order may auto-cancel if overdue
%1$s left to pay — the order may auto-cancel if overdue
%1$s left for the buyer to pay — the order may auto-cancel if overdue
%1$s left to complete payment after the meetup
%1$s left for the buyer to pay after the meetup
Price agreed — choose meetup or shipping
Status: choose how to complete (meetup or shipping).
Status: buyer is choosing meetup or shipping.
Could not save your delivery choice. Try again.
Use chat to schedule the meetup, arrive on time, and complete the deal in person. No in-app payment on the cash path.
Order status can be: awaiting action, preparing to ship, in transit, delivered, cancelled, or disputed. For more help, contact customer support.
No chat thread for this order yet.
Could not update shipment. Try again.
Choose where your order will be sent.
Manage saved addresses. Set a default for faster listing and checkout.
Use this address for future orders
Please fill in all required fields.
Add at least one shipping address. You can set one as default for faster checkout.
Could not load addresses from server. Showing saved addresses on device.
Could not load the administrative catalog (province / district / ward). Check your connection and common-service auth (JWT or INTERNAL_SECRET must match the server), then try again.
Could not set default. Try again.
Pick Province/City → District → Ward from the Vietnam catalog (common-service).
Why are you reporting this user?
Report submitted. Thank you for helping keep the community safe.
You have already reported this user for this conversation.
You are not allowed to report this user.
Failed to submit report. Please try again.
Upgrade to verify Real/Fake items, boost Explore visibility, and get featured on Fash channels.
Payment goes live when the package is released. Price may change before launch.
This package is not on sale yet. You can preview the benefits; checkout opens when Fash releases the package.
Send a short message with the Play Store link plus an in-app deep link — one tap for friends who already installed Fash.
Fash is building a priority program for members who grow the community. More genuine invites can mean more weight when we roll out new perks and early access.
Future campaigns may favor members who helped the marketplace scale — inviting friends is a clear signal you believe in the community.
Pre-loved shopping is better with friends on the same app: faster chats, more trust, and a feed that feels closer to your style.

Join me on Fash — a pre-loved fashion marketplace.

🔗 Tap to join (HTTPS — linkified in chat/SMS): %1$s

📲 New here? Get the app on Play Store: %2$s

Real invites help the community grow; we are preparing priority perks for members who bring friends in.

Messages use https://…/invite so apps underline a tappable link. Installed users can open the invite screen directly; without the app, the link opens in a browser — host a small /invite page or redirect to Play Store. fash://invite?ref=… still works inside the app but usually stays plain text in chat.
Share your link and grow priority perks as the community scales.
Sign in when you are ready
You can explore Home and Explore first. We only ask you to sign in when you want to chat, buy, sell, or save listings.
Profile, saved items, and settings unlock after you sign in.
Messaging sellers requires an account to protect both sides.
Listing and seller tools require a verified account.
Orders and payments are tied to your account.
Order, chat, and promo alerts need a signed-in account.
Saving favorites syncs across devices after sign-in.
Liking items requires sign-in to sync across your devices.
Buying or chatting with a seller requires a secure sign-in.
Follow sellers to see their new listings on Home — sign in to continue.
A friend invited you to Fash — sign in or create an account to join the community.
Orders, alerts, chat, and your profile unlock after you sign in.
Match my size needs sign-in so we can use the size saved on your profile.
Nearby shops needs sign-in so we can use your default address.
Personal picks use your taste and activity — sign in to turn them on.
Follow shops and see their new listings on Home — sign in to continue.
Style picks use your profile preferences — sign in so Fash knows your vibe.
Similar-to-saved needs your wishlist — sign in to sync saves.
Sign in for picks tailored to your taste and browsing history.
Follow sellers you love — their new drops show up here on Home.
Set your style in profile — Fash filters listings to match your vibe.
Save favorites — Fash suggests more items in the same style.
Sign in to see items matched to your area and season.
Add an address or set your browse area for season-aware suggestions.
Sign in to unlock this feed
Sign in to see your profile, listings, wishlist, and settings. Until then, keep browsing Home and Explore.
Chat with sellers after sign-in — clearer and safer for both sides.
Create an account to list pre-loved items and manage your shop.
Sign in to track purchases, sales, and order status. Until then, keep discovering items via search on Home.
Sign in to see listings from shops you follow. For now, try Today\'s picks and Explore below.
